channel.title: dead-code-hunter Architecture Docs
channel.description: Architecture documentation for the dead-code-hunter codebase. Explore files, functions, classes, domains, and dependencies.

item.title: AnalysisClient Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: The core logic for processing dead code results and filtering findings. Architectural overview of the AnalysisClient domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: GitHubAction Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: The entry point and workflow orchestration layer for the GitHub Action environment. Architectural overview of the GitHubAction domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 3 source files.

item.title: ReportingEngine Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: Handles the transformation of analysis metadata into user-facing documentation and feedback. Architectural overview of the ReportingEngine domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: TestingSuite Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: Contains unit and integration tests to ensure the reliability of the analysis and reporting logic. Architectural overview of the TestingSuite domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 2 source files.
